title: Display GitHub PR Link in Development Tasks Card
description: As a project manager, I want to see a direct link to the GitHub pull request in the Development Tasks card when 'Create PR' action is triggered, so that I can quickly navigate to review the code changes and track development progress.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Given a user story with 'Create PR' action completed, when viewing the Development Tasks card, then a clickable GitHub PR link should be visible
Given the GitHub PR link is displayed, when clicked, then it should open the PR in a new browser tab/window
Given no PR has been created yet, when viewing the Development Tasks card, then no PR link should be displayed
Given the PR link is displayed, when the PR is merged or closed, then the link status should be visually indicated (e.g., different color or icon)

tasks.description: Update Development Tasks card component to display PR link when available
Implement API endpoint to retrieve PR URL from backend
Add PR status tracking (open/merged/closed) to display appropriate visual indicators
Test PR link functionality across different browsers

investAnalysis.feedback: Story meets INVEST criteria with clear value proposition and testable acceptance criteria
